title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3 and other LLMs locally with one command and a simple REST/CLI API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models in a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs entirely in browser or Docker.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive TUI (Rust) for browsing, downloading and chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with private PDFs offline.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; Spring Boot starter included.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function-calling, vision, fine-tune, Docker, Home-Assistant, etc.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing the JS/TS client for Ollama.

title: ollama-py
summary: Official PyPI package for the Python client library.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord.py bot that streams answers from any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to query local Ollama models for note Q&A and summarization.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: LogSeq plugin that adds /ollama slash command for inline LLM assistance.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate wrapping the Ollama REST API with tokio.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: Next.js chat interface that can swap between Ollama and GPT4All backends at runtime.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example deploying Ollama for scalable local inference across GPUs.
